purpose: DREAM/GOLD author bio exemplar, template, rubric, and fact-governance layer for RevisionGrade Agent Readiness.
runtime_rule: Use exemplars for pattern calibration only. Never copy exemplar facts, credentials, residences, project titles, identity claims, or personal history into generated output unless those facts are present in the selected author's supplied materials or verified project metadata.
primary_rule: Prefer manuscript-relevant authority over generic literary credentials.

query_letter_bio.purpose: Concise credibility paragraph inside a query letter.
best_for: submission packages with tight word count

agent_submission_bio.purpose: Standalone agent-facing author bio for package sections and longer agency forms.

short_form_submission_bio.purpose: Compressed credibility bio for short form fields.

website_press_bio.purpose: Brand-forward author bio for website, press kit, and book pages.

exemplars.use_case: Query-letter closing bio for a Sinaloa/cartel-system literary suspense manuscript.
strengths: connects regional experience to the manuscript

exemplars.use_case: Longer Agent Readiness author bio with authority, project lane, and literary brand.
strengths: balances rank, professional background, and manuscript relevance
connects British Columbia and Culiacán/Sinaloa to the work
uses related projects to show coherent author brand
ends with literary positioning rather than résumé clutter

exemplars.use_case: Compressed QueryTracker-style author bio under strict field limits.
Brand-forward bio for websites, press kits, and book pages.
strengths: allows atmospheric language where query letters should not
